description: A farmer is about to spray a field and needs to assess the risk of spray drift to a neighboring sensitive crop.

nodes.task_description: Get the real-time wind speed and direction from an on-farm weather station.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the current weather conditions.

nodes.task_description: Identify the location of any sensitive areas, such as an organic vegetable field, downwind from the target field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a sensitive area within the potential drift zone.

nodes.task_description: Based on the wind speed and direction, advise the farmer to either wait for calmer conditions or use a drift-reducing nozzle and maintain a larger buffer zone.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear recommendation to mitigate the drift risk.
